reason: Agent responded correctly with mathematical answer "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded with sidebar showing "Your Agents" list containing QA-20260505-181644-6mhw agent
Clicked on QA-20260505-181644-6mhw agent in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded with status showing "idle"
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator confirmed as "idle" (meets requirement for "running" or "idle")
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input field — Message appeared in input field successfully
Clicked send button to submit message — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", session "Quick Math Question Session" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response arrived within approximately 1 second showing "4" and agent status returned to "idle"
Took final screenshot — Screenshot shows complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" on the right and agent response "4" in the center, confirming response mentions "4"
